summary: CCA is presented as a structured coding-agent stack with plausible context and memory mechanisms, but the strongest performance claims remain benchmark-bounded rather than fully component-isolated.

bounded_claims.claim_text: CCA outperforms the named comparison agents on SWE-Bench-Pro across the three reported model settings.
bounded_claims.bounds: The evidence supports a bounded benchmark comparison on the public SWE-Bench-Pro split with mean Resolve@1 across three runs, but it does not identify which SDK component caused the advantage or establish general superiority beyond the reported settings.
